title: Cupid Parasite Game Gets PC Release
content: Idea Factory International announced on Wednesday that it will release the Cupid Parasite otome visual novel on PC via Steam in 2026, which marks its first otome release on the platform since 2018. The company streamed an announcement trailer: The otome game centers on the heroine, the goddess of love Cupid.
author: ANN

title: Chainsaw Man: Reze Arc Stage Play Reveals Cast, Trailer, Dates
content: The official website for CHAINSAW MAN THE STAGE , the stage play adaptation of Tatsuki Fujimoto 's Chainsaw Man manga, revealed on Thursday the cast, trailer, visual, and dates for CHAINSAW MAN THE STAGE Reze-hen , the second stage play adapting the manga's Reze Arc.
author: ANN

title: Naruto Teases Big Announcements For This Summer
content: While the Naruto franchise has handed off the ninja baton to the next generation thanks to Boruto: Two Blue Vortex , the anime series has been missing in action for years. Following the fight against Code, Boruto and the Hidden Leaf Village have been absent from the screen, with Studio Pierrot focusing more on Bleach:…
author: ComicBook

title: 2026’s Spring Magical Fantasy Anime Proves It’s the Harry Potter Anime Everyone Wanted
content: The new episodes of currently airing anime in the Spring season are expanding their foundations, and one series with a magical premise confirms itself as the kind of Harry Potter –type anime fans have long hoped for. What made J.K.
author: ComicBook

title: My Boyfriend in Orange Manga Ends in Next Chapter
content: The June issue of Kodansha 's Dessert magazine announced on Thursday that Non Tamashima 's My Boyfriend in Orange ( Moekare wa Orange-iro ) manga will end in its next chapter in the magazine's September issue, which will ship in July.
author: ANN

title: Re:ZERO Season 4 Reveals Creditless Ending Movie Video Featuring Song by MYTH & ROID and TK
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has revealed the creditless ending video following its debut in Episode 3 today. Season 4 began on April 8 and ranked first in both our weekly polls of the season .
author: Anime Corner

title: 2025’s Creepiest Video Game Has Released Its New Manga
content: When it comes to creepy video game franchises, Resident Evil is far from the only series that has sent shivers down the spines of gamers. In the history of the medium, we’ve seen creepy video games that inject zombies, ghosts, extraterrestrial skin walkers, and everything in between, threatening players worldwide.
author: ComicBook

title: Agents of the Four Seasons Reveals Episode 5 Preview
content: The preview of Agents of the Four Seasons Episode 5 has been revealed. The upcoming episode is slated to release on Saturday, April 25. Crunchyroll and Bilibili are streaming the series. Wit Studio is animating with Ken Yamamoto as director.
author: Anime Corner

title: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore Anime by CloverWorks Reveals Teaser Visual, Trailer, 2027 Premiere
content: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore TV anime revealed a teaser visual and trailer along with a 2027 premiere on Wednesday. CloverWorks is animating the series and the main staff and cast were also announced. Mamoru Kanbe is directing the anime with Ayako Kurata as assistant director.
author: Anime Corner

title: Godzilla Announces New Universe, “Godzilla World”
content: In North America, the MonsterVerse has become a juggernaut for Legendary Entertainment as the second season of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters roars on Apple TV. This fall, the King of the Monsters is planning to return with the highly anticipated sequel to Godzilla Minus One, Godzilla Minus Zero .
author: ComicBook
